Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: JDS Hiei is a 'helicopter destroyer' (DDH), a unique type of ASW combatant operated by the JMSDF. This ship embarks 3 x HSS-2B Sea Kings, a license-built version of the US SH-3H Sea King ASW helicopter.

Let's get one of these helicopters airborne to investigate the noise contact we have detected. Use the Flight Deck controls to launch one HSS-2B with an ASW loadout, then order it to proceed towards the contact with a waypoint on the Tactical Display.

Note: all aircraft launches in Sea Power will incur a 'prep' time, as well as a 'cooldown' time (when landing after a mission). By default, all ships with ASW helicopters will start each mission with one helicopter prepped and ready for launch. All additional aircraft must undergo preparation before taking off.
